case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. SAMEH A MOUSSA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-31-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SAMEH MOUSSA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING TO SEP-07-2016 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILE AN AMENDED APPLICATION BY 9/2/16 WITH A COURTESY COPY DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-07-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SAMEH MOUSSA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
